info.title: Robin Workplace API
info.description: The Robin Workplace API provides programmatic access to manage workplaces, spaces, desks, events, reservations, and more.

post.summary: Create a location for an organization
Create a user for an organization

get.summary: Get a specific user in an organization

post.summary: Create an amenity for an organization

get.summary: Get presence information for a user
Get presence information for the current user
Get events for the current user

post.summary: Create a space in a location

get.summary: Get presence information for a location

post.summary: Create an event in a space

get.summary: Get a specific amenity for a space

put.summary: Add or update an amenity for a space

delete.summary: Remove an amenity from a space

get.summary: Get presence information for a space
Get the current state of a space
Get confirmation status for an event

put.summary: Add or update an amenity for a seat

delete.summary: Remove an amenity from a seat

patch.summary: Partially update an amenity for a seat

get.summary: Get a specific setting for a seat

put.summary: Set a specific setting for a seat

post.summary: Create a reservation for a seat
Publish a shared schedule for a seat

get.summary: Get a seat reservation by ID
Get instances of a recurring seat reservation
Get confirmation status for a seat reservation

delete.summary: Remove confirmation from a seat reservation

get.summary: Get exclusions for a seat reservation

post.summary: Create an exclusion for a seat reservation

accessToken.name: Authorization
accessToken.description: Access token authentication. Use the format: Access-Token {{token}}

space_ids.description: List of space IDs to check
